title: COP 4710 – Database Design
text: 3/29/26, 12.22 AM COP 4710 _ Database Design - University of South Florida COP 4710 Database Design Credit(s): 3 This course covers the fundamentals and applications of database management systems, including data models, relational database design, query languages, and web-based database applications Prerequisite(s): CQP 4530 (min grade C-) https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103476&print 1/1
